title: EQ - Custom EQ, change some values, Save EQ, dialog present
scenario: Verify that saving a custom EQ after changing values shows a confirmation dialog with "Your custom EQ has been saved." and an OK button matching Figma spec.
steps: Open the audio settings or equalizer panel.
Select or switch to the 'Custom EQ' mode.
Adjust some EQ band values (e.g., increase or decrease gain).
expected: A dialog appears with the message "Your custom EQ has been saved." and an OK button. The dialog's UI matches the Figma specification.
